title: Entity On Equipment Changed
description: Allows to specify events to execute when equipment is set in the entity's default equipment slots. Doesn't apply to "minecraft:inventory", use "minecraft:equippable" instead.

slots.title: Slots
slots.description:
A list of slot-specific events to execute when the entity's equipment changes in those slots.

Properties:
• on_equip (string) = 
• on_unequip (string) = 
• slot (string) = slot.weapon.mainhand
